package sample

var serviceName = "deslop"

type Store interface {
	Save(item string) error
}

type PrimaryStore struct{}

func (PrimaryStore) Save(item string) error {
	return nil
}

type BackupStore struct{}

func (BackupStore) Save(item string) error {
	return nil
}

type Mode int

func Run(mode Mode) {}

func Read() string {
	return serviceName
}
